economic_notes: Nation has interests in multiple business entities including Tse Keh Nay LLP (33.33%), Claw Mountain Outfitters LLP (50%), Three Feathers LP (33.33%), KNGV Freight Services JV (50%), Kwadacha Natural Resources LP (99.99%), Obo Forest Management LP (99.99%), Kwadacha Air LP (99.99%), Kwadacha Green Energy LP (99.99%). Community Store generates significant own-source revenue.
notes: Audit qualified for two reasons: (1) No assessment completed on PS 3280 Asset Retirement Obligation - impact unknown; (2) Nation did not prepare and approve a budget for the year ended March 31, 2024 as required by Canadian Public Sector Accounting Standards. Three fully consolidated subsidiaries: 0936269 B.C. Ltd., Kwadacha Settlement Negotiations Agreement, and Kwadacha Land Corp. Eight government business entities/partnerships accounted for by modified equity method. Three entities accounted for at cost. Total government transfers estimated as ISC ($9,868,545) + Province of BC ($6,107,871) + First Nations Health Authority ($2,346,628) + New Relationship Trust ($431,500) + Government of Canada ($68,480) + First Peoples Heritage Language and Culture Council ($64,944) + BC Hydro Trust Funds Contribution ($2,196,500) = $21,084,468. Debt service = repayment of debt $297,829 + repayment of promissory note $110,758 = $408,587.
